description: Perform an urban economic analysis to identify employment sector specializations across San Francisco zones using the notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/employment_concentration.ipynb. Using data from /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5 (jobs, buildings, and parcels tables), calculate the Location Quotient (LQ) for each zone-sector combination where LQ(z,s) = (jobs in sector s in zone z / total jobs in zone z) / (citywide jobs in sector s / citywide total jobs). Exclude zones with zero total jobs. Save the LQ results to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/location_quotients.csv with columns: zone_id, sector_id, zone_sector_jobs, zone_total_jobs, and location_quotient. Identify the sector with the highest LQ for each zone and save the results to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/zone_specializations.csv with columns: zone_id, top_sector_id, top_lq, and zone_total_jobs. Generate a heatmap visualization of LQs and save it to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/sector_concentration_heatmap.png. The notebook should be fully executed.
